roadmap: Step 1: Master the Basics - Start with variables, data types, loops, and functions. Understand the core syntax.
Step 2: Learn Data Structures - Get comfortable with lists, dictionaries, tuples, and sets.
Step 3: Explore OOP - Understand classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.
Step 4: Build Small Projects - Create a simple calculator, a to-do list app, or a web scraper.
Step 5: Specialize - Choose a path. For web dev, learn Flask or Django. For data, learn Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.

resources.title: Official Python Tutorial
resources.description: The official, comprehensive documentation and tutorial from the creators of Python.

resources.title: freeCodeCamp: Python for Everybody
resources.description: A highly-rated, free full-length course covering Python from the ground up.

resources.title: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
resources.description: A practical, project-based book (free to read online) for beginners.

onlineCourses.title: Python for Everybody (Coursera)
onlineCourses.description: Dr. Chuck's famous specialization. Covers basics to web scraping and databases.

onlineCourses.title: 100 Days of Code: The Complete Python Pro Bootcamp (Udemy)
onlineCourses.description: A project-heavy bootcamp that takes you from beginner to building a portfolio.

onlineCourses.title: CS50's Introduction to Programming with Python (Harvard edX)
onlineCourses.description: An in-depth university-level course on Python, focusing on fundamentals and problem-solving.

roadmap: Step 1: Understand Search Engine Basics - Learn how Google, Bing, etc., crawl, index, and rank pages.
Step 2: Master Keyword Research - Learn to find what users are searching for using tools like Ahrefs, Semrush, or Google Keyword Planner.
Step 3: Learn On-Page SEO - Optimize title tags, meta descriptions, content, and internal linking.
Step 4: Learn Technical SEO - Understand site speed, mobile-friendliness, sitemaps, and structured data.
Step 5: Understand Off-Page & Content - Learn how to earn backlinks and create content that satisfies user intent.

resources.title: Moz: The Beginner's Guide to SEO
resources.description: An industry-standard, multi-chapter guide covering all fundamentals of SEO.

resources.title: Ahrefs Blog
resources.description: High-quality, data-driven articles on SEO strategies and case studies.

resources.title: Google Search Central
resources.description: Google's official documentation and starter guide for SEO.
